## Meeting Purpose

[Review the draft for the law firm industry page and discuss testimonial strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Testimonials for Social Proof:** New testimonials from diverse clients (e.g., Summit Point, a PT firm) will be used to prove Smith.ai's value beyond the legal sector and build trust for the AI receptionist product.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Law Page Rewrite:** The law firm page requires a rewrite to focus on empathy for sensitive legal situations, clearly differentiate AI vs. human agent roles, and correct inaccurate feature claims (e.g., AI conflict checks).](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The hub will move from purely educational content to include real-world examples and social proof (quotes, logos) to increase stickiness and conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**Year-End Review:** The next meeting will be an extended 45-minute session to review 2025 performance and align on 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Topics

### Testimonial Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build social proof for the AI receptionist product and demonstrate Smith.ai's value across diverse industries.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** Many clients are savvy business owners who understand unit economics, having transitioned from large companies to run their own firms.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**Example Client: Summit Point**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [**Business:** SMB manufacturing large-scale event displays (e.g., for the World Cup).](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Critical deadlines require perfect vendor communication; a missed call about a material delay has massive financial impact.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**Solution:** Smith.ai provides a reliable, cost-effective communication safety net.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The client was so impressed, they expanded Smith.ai services to their two other businesses (consulting, financial services).](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [Maddy to send video/transcripts to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Jo to pull verbatim quotes for the hub and industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
      - [**Idea:** Create a "highlight reel" video compilation for post-website email personalization.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)

### Law Practice Page Review

  - [**Hero Text:**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Problem:** "Complex situations" is too generic; it doesn't resonate with lawyers.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [**Solution:** Focus on empathy for "sensitive situations" (e.g., personal injury, wills) to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**AI vs. Human Agent Roles:**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [**Problem:** The draft undersells AI capabilities and misrepresents agent functions.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [**Solution:** Clearly differentiate roles:](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
          - [**AI:** High-volume lead screening, consistent questioning, basic info collection.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
          - [**Human Agents:** Complex intake, nuanced judgment, de-escalation, manual form completion.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [**Call Flow & Integrations:**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Problem:** The draft makes inaccurate claims (e.g., AI conflict checks) and is redundant.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
      - [**Solution:** Rewrite to focus on the full call lifecycle:](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
        1.  [**Handling:** Custom call flows route calls.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
        2.  [**Handoff:** AI transfers, summarizes, and notifies the team.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
        3.  [**Logging:** Integrations create/update records in practice management software, eliminating manual data entry.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Call Analytics:**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Problem:** The draft claims analytics features Smith.ai does not possess (e.g., tracking case patterns, referral sources).](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Solution:** Focus on real capabilities (call recordings, volume trends) and the power of integrating Smith.ai with a practice management system to tie call handling efficiency to firm growth.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)

      - [Add social proof (Clutch badges, logos) to the law practice page.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [**Maddy:**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [Send testimonial videos and transcripts to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Review the revised law practice page draft (ETA: 4:30 PM Jo's time today).](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Schedule a 45-minute year-end review for next week to discuss 2025 performance and 2026 strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CAW3dWy8CC3nk8qQtH3QRY42kwzeS7GA?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
